qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SSRF via webhook delivery redirect following bypasses IsBlockedLocalHostname check
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes SSRF via webhook delivery redirect following in webhook.go/httplib.go. The advisory describes RCE via .git/config update through UpdateRepoFile in contents.go:197-206. These are entirely different vulnerable code paths, root causes (redirect following without re-validation vs missing security check for symlink-based .git/config modification), and vulnerability classes (SSRF vs OS Command Injection via CWE-78).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory describes RCE via UpdateRepoFile in contents.go allowing .git/config modification through symlink files. The only qualifying finding describes SSRF via webhook delivery redirect following in webhook.go/httplib.go, which is a different vulnerable code path, different root cause, and different vulnerability class.
